title: Buy One Get One Free McDouble
description: Buy any McDouble at regular price, get a second one free. Valid at participating locations. Limit one per customer per visit.

title: $1 Any Size Soft Drink
description: Any size fountain drink for just $1. Available through the McDonald's app at participating locations.

title: Free Medium Fries with $1 Purchase
description: Order any item for $1 or more and get a free medium fries. App order required.
